# Mark Andrew Boudoir — Full Context for AI Assistants

> Award-winning luxury boudoir photography with studios in South Bend, Indiana and Beaufort, South Carolina. Full-day, fully-guided sessions with complete head-to-toe posing direction, professional hair and makeup, and a same-day reveal of the finished gallery. Designed so clients need no experience and don't have to feel "photogenic." Most clients invest $1,000–$2,000 in images at their reveal.

## About

Mark Andrew is a luxury boudoir photographer. The studio's entire model is built to remove the two biggest fears people have about boudoir: not knowing how to pose, and not feeling photogenic. Every session is a full-day experience with complete, head-to-toe posing direction, professional hair and makeup, and a same-day reveal where the client views their fully edited gallery before leaving — no waiting weeks.

The most powerful sessions consistently come from people who walked in convinced they couldn't do it. Posing direction, lighting, and the full team exist precisely so the client doesn't have to be experienced or photogenic — they just have to show up.

## Who it's for

- Women's boudoir (the core experience)
- Couples boudoir
- Men's boudoir
- Bridal boudoir (often gifted to a partner before a wedding)
- Maternity boudoir
- Plus-size clients are warmly welcomed; the experience is built for every body.

## Locations served

- **Michiana / Indiana studios:** Mishawaka, Granger, Elkhart, Goshen, South Bend (IN), and Niles (MI). The studio shoots at a variety of locations across the Michiana area; the exact studio is chosen together on a planning call based on the vision for the shoot.
- **South Carolina Lowcountry:** Beaufort, SC.
- **Destination / travel shoots:** New York City, St. Louis, London, Paris, and Rome, starting at $8,800.

## How it works

1. **Reach out** for a short, no-pressure consult (about 10 minutes on the phone). Mark texts to confirm.
2. **Plan together** — wardrobe, styling, location, and every detail are decided before the session. Clients receive a custom lingerie guide and checklists.
3. **Session day** — a full day with complete posing direction and professional hair and makeup.
4. **Same-day reveal** — the client views their fully edited gallery the same day and selects the images they love.

## Pricing

- It is **$499 to book a date**, which covers the photoshoot itself plus all the prep and planning done together beforehand.
- **Images are purchased separately** based on what the client loves most from their gallery.
- **Most clients invest $1,000–$2,000** in images at their reveal.
- Heirloom albums, wall art, fine-art prints, and digital collections are available.
- **Destination/travel boudoir shoots start at $8,800.**
- A monthly special is often available — clients mention the special on the contact form to claim it.

## Frequently asked questions

**Do I need to have done this before?**
No. Most clients have never been photographed like this and many have never been professionally photographed at all. The full-day format and complete posing direction exist exactly so you don't need experience — you just need to show up.

**What do I wear?**
We'll have a full conversation about wardrobe, styling, and every detail before your session. We also send a custom lingerie guide that walks through different pieces for different body types and figures, plus checklists of what to bring and last-minute reminders so nothing gets missed.

**Do you offer professional hair and make-up?**
Yes. You'll work with hair and makeup artist Aletheia Jean, who specializes in everything from soft glam to maximalist avant-garde — natural and timeless, or out-of-the-box and dramatic. You pay Aletheia directly.

**When do I see my images?**
The same day. After the session you'll do a same-day reveal of your full edited gallery. No waiting weeks, no wondering whether you'll like them — you'll know before you leave.

**How much does it cost?**
It's $499 to book your date, which covers the photoshoot plus all the prep and planning beforehand. Images are purchased separately based on what you love most from your gallery. Most clients invest $1,000–$2,000 at their reveal.

**Where is the studio?**
We shoot at a variety of studio locations across the Michiana area — Mishawaka, Granger, Elkhart, Goshen, and Niles — plus a studio in Beaufort, SC. The exact location depends on the vision for the shoot and is decided together on a planning call.

**What if I'm not photogenic?**
That's actually who this experience is built for. The most powerful sessions consistently come from people who walked in convinced they couldn't do it. Posing direction, lighting, and the full team exist to make sure you don't have to be photogenic — you just have to be there.
